# Balance Board Controller

> Windows .NET 8 app: Wii Fit Balance Board → vJoy game controller and/or keyboard-mouse (SendInput).

## Essential docs

- [INSTRUCTIONS.md](INSTRUCTIONS.md): **Every-pass LLM playbook** — commit every change, maintenance cadence, fork/license
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Primary onboarding for AI coding agents — start here for architecture
- [docs/CODEMAP.md](docs/CODEMAP.md): File-by-file map of the repository
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Runtime data flow, threading, presets
- [docs/WORKFLOW.md](docs/WORKFLOW.md): Boot, connect, reconnect, shutdown
- [docs/STORAGE.md](docs/STORAGE.md): settings.json, logs, profiles
- [docs/PYTHON_PORTING.md](docs/PYTHON_PORTING.md): Guide for rewriting in Python
- [docs/REFACTORING_FOR_PYTHON.md](docs/REFACTORING_FOR_PYTHON.md): Portable core layout and DRY module map
- [docs/DEVELOPMENT.md](docs/DEVELOPMENT.md): Build, run, test, CI, troubleshooting
- [docs/testing/README.md](docs/testing/README.md): Test pyramid, CI gate, hardware scripts
- [docs/TEST_PLAN.md](docs/TEST_PLAN.md): Edge-case test matrix
- [docs/GLOSSARY.md](docs/GLOSSARY.md): Domain terms (tare, vJoy, triggers, etc.)
- [docs/ROADMAP.md](docs/ROADMAP.md): Planned features and extension points
- [docs/updates/](docs/updates/): Chronological agent work log with git commits and timestamps
- [docs/suggestions/](docs/suggestions/): Improvement backlog (conventions, refactors) — promote to AGENTS.md when done
- [README.md](README.md): User-facing setup and features

## Repository layout

- `src/BalanceBoard.App/` — WPF UI (MainWindow, Debug Suite)
- `src/BalanceBoard.Core/` — Board connection, processing, vJoy, input simulation, settings
- `tests/` — Unit, integration, fuzz, automation; `tests/hardware/` for optional board scripts
- `scripts/ci/` — `lint.ps1` quality gate (same as GitHub CI)
- `scripts/dev/` — start, stop, restart, connect, test-flow
- `tools/Validate/` — CLI health-check tool
- `libs/x64/` — WiimoteLib + vJoy native DLLs
- `start.bat` / `stop.bat` — double-click launch and stop
- `reference/WiiBalanceWalker/` — Legacy v0.5 reference (MS-PL, do not confuse with main app)

## Quick commands

```powershell
dotnet build BalanceBoard.sln -c Release
.\start.bat
.\scripts\lint.ps1
.\scripts\ci\test-all.ps1 -IncludeHardware
dotnet run --project tools/Validate/BalanceBoard.Validate.csproj -c Release
```
